raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/2022 I became aware that I had been a victim of identity theft. Someone had hacked my XXXX account and had purchased american express gift cards on both my blue and gold American express cards. I immediately contacted american express as well as the XXXX XXXX XXXX Crimes Division and then filed police report. 
The Gold removed the charges, the blue card said i had been scammed. The exact same items were purchased on both cards, yet the blue card, refused to remove the charges. I contacted experian regarding the dispute, and they have ruled in American express 's favor, which I think is ridiculous. How could the exact transactions be treated differently?
